title: Hungy
body:
Make most items edible! Along with a config located in "config/hungy.json"

This was made as a meme mod for the modpack [Compression](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/compression)

Do note: If an item has right-click interactions this mod may not function with said item. Ie, buckets, shields, bows, etc. Blocks work just fine.
